name: Sadie's Shrimp Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni, drain, and cool.
2. In a large bowl, mix the cooked macaroni with shrimp, eggs, onions, celery, olives, and pickles. Toss well to combine.
3. To make the dressing, in a separate bowl, combine mayonnaise, olive oil, hot sauce, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and ketchup. Mix until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the macaroni and shrimp mixture. Toss everything together until evenly coated.
5. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving to allow flavors to meld.
6. You may need to make additional dressing if the salad absorbs it quickly during serving.
Serves 30 people for a real picnic or party.
